title: Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew made with tender lamb and flavorful spices.

ingredients.name: lamb
ingredients.amount: 1 1/2 pounds boneless lamb shoulder, cut into 2-inch pieces

instructions: Heat the olive oil in the tagine or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the feta cheese and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with parsley and serve hot.
Serve over couscous or with crusty bread.
